title: Berge Bulk report reveals dry bulk fleet is exceeding IMO carbon intensity goals, but scope one emissions rise
summary: Berge Bulk claims its dry bulk fleet is exceeding IMO carbon intensity targets, a relative improvement. However, this purported progress is undermined by a concurrent rise in absolute Scope One emissions. Such conflicting data demands full transparency to assess genuine environmental impact, not just relative efficiency metrics, especially concerning potential FuelEU Maritime penalties.
